message:
🧹 Replace ~15 raw ms literals with MS_PER_MINUTE/MS_PER_HOUR/MS_PER_DAY (#10324)

* 🧹 Replace ~15 raw ms literals with MS_PER_MINUTE/MS_PER_HOUR/MS_PER_DAY constants

Replace raw 60000, 3600000, 86400000, 604800000 literals across 6 files
with shared constants from lib/constants/time.ts:

- ActiveAlerts.tsx: 60_000 → MS_PER_MINUTE
- GitOps.tsx: 60000 → MS_PER_MINUTE
- AlertDetail.tsx: 60000 → MS_PER_MINUTE (already had MINUTES_PER_HOUR import)
- RecentEvents.tsx: 60000 → MS_PER_MINUTE
- UpdateSettings.tsx: 60000/3600000/86400000/604800000 → MS_PER_* constants
- GPUUsageTrend.tsx: 60000/180000/900000/3600000 → MS_PER_MINUTE/MS_PER_HOUR

Fixes #10320

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🧹 Replace additional raw ms literals in 7 more card components

Continue replacing raw 60000/3600000/86400000 with shared constants:
- GitHubActivity.tsx: 86400000/3600000 → MS_PER_DAY/MS_PER_HOUR
- ClusterChangelog.tsx: 60000/3600000/86400000 → MS_PER_MINUTE/MS_PER_HOUR/MS_PER_DAY
- NamespaceEvents.tsx: same pattern as ClusterChangelog
- NamespaceMonitor.tsx: 60000 → MS_PER_MINUTE
- PodHealthTrend.tsx: 60000 → MS_PER_MINUTE
- WarningEvents.tsx: replace getTimeAgo with shared formatTimeAgo
- RSSFeed.tsx: 3600000 → MS_PER_HOUR

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

 /** Format remaining DND time as "Xh Ym" or "Ym" */
 function formatRemaining(ms: number): string {
-  const totalMinutes = Math.ceil(ms / 60_000)
+  const totalMinutes = Math.ceil(ms / MS_PER_MINUTE)
   const hours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60)
   const minutes = totalMinutes % 60
   if (hours > 0) return `${hours}h ${minutes}m`

 function getMinutesAgo(timestamp: string | undefined): string {
   if (!timestamp) return 'Unknown'
   const diffMs = Date.now() - new Date(timestamp).getTime()
-  const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000)
+  const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / MS_PER_MINUTE)
   if (diffMins < 1) return 'Just now'
   if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins}m ago`
   return `${Math.floor(diffMins / 60)}h ago`
